early_life.title: Early Life & Childhood
questions: Where and when were you born?
What is your earliest memory?
Tell me about the home where you grew up.
What was your neighborhood like?
What were your favorite activities as a child?

family.title: Family & Heritage
questions: Tell me about your parents.
Do you have siblings? What was your relationship like?
What family traditions were important?
What values did your family teach you?

education.title: Education & Learning
questions: What was school like for you?
Who was a teacher that influenced you?
What subjects did you love?
What important lessons did you learn outside school?

career.title: Career & Purpose
questions: What was your first job?
How did you find your career path?
What achievement are you most proud of?
What challenges did you overcome professionally?

relationships.title: Love & Relationships
questions: Tell me about your closest friendships.
Have you had significant romantic relationships?
Who has been most influential in your life?
What have you learned about love?

experiences.title: Life Experiences
questions: What's the most adventurous thing you've done?
Tell me about a place that changed you.
What historical events have you witnessed?
Describe a moment of pure joy.

wisdom.title: Beliefs & Wisdom
questions: What do you believe in most strongly?
What causes are you passionate about?
What wisdom would you share with the world?
What does living well mean to you?

legacy.title: Legacy & Reflection
questions: What are you most grateful for?
How do you want to be remembered?
What would you tell your younger self?
What brings you peace now?
